name: Lemon-Stuffed Trout
recipeIngredient: 1 trout, pan-dressed and boned (from stomach to head)
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the stuffing: Sweat the shallots in the butter.
2. Add the bread crumbs, lemon juice, zest, parsley, beaten eggs, thyme, salt, and pepper. Combine the mixture well and reserve it.
3. Rub the inside cavity of the fish with lemon juice to help dissolve any remaining bones.
4. Place the stuffing in the cavity and fold the fish closed.
5. Place the fish in a buttered baking dish.
6. Pour the wine around the fish.
7. Dot the fish with butter.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven until done.
9. Serve trout with Hollandaise sauce, lemon slices, and parsley.
